properties.description: Unique identifier for the learning transcript
Identifier of the user taking the learning object
Reference to the learning object being taken
Current status of the learning transcript
Score achieved in the learning object (if applicable)
Date by which the learning object should be completed
Date when the learning object was completed
Array of custom field objects with fieldId and value
Records of user learning object completions and progress

measure.name: completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: total_credits_earned
measure.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN credits ELSE 0 END)

measure.name: avg_score
measure.expression: AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN score END)

properties.description: Core metrics for learning completion analysis

measure.name: on_time_completions
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' AND completionDate <= dueDate THEN 1 END)

measure.name: late_completions
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' AND completionDate > dueDate THEN 1 END)

measure.name: overdue_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN status != 'COMPLETED' AND dueDate < CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 END)

measure.name: avg_days_to_complete
measure.expression: AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN DATEDIFF(day, audit.assignedDate, completionDate) END)

views.name: user_completion_summary
views.statement: SELECT userId, COUNT(*) as total_assignments, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) as completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN credits ELSE 0 END) as total_credits, AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN score END) as avg_score FROM learning_transcripts GROUP BY userId ORDER BY total_credits DESC

properties.description: Summary of user learning completions and achievements

views.name: custom_field_analysis
views.statement: SELECT cf.fieldId, cf.value, COUNT(*) as count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) as completed_count FROM learning_transcripts lt, unnest(customFields) as cf GROUP BY cf.fieldId, cf.value ORDER BY count DESC

properties.description: Analysis of learning transcripts by custom field values

views.name: overdue_analysis
views.statement: SELECT * FROM learning_transcripts WHERE status != 'COMPLETED' AND dueDate < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY dueDate ASC

properties.description: Possible status values for learning transcripts
